title: Over 50% for DA in Knysna
description: ELECTION NEWS - The screenshots of the...
bodyText:
ELECTION NEWS - The screenshots of the Knysna and Bitou results were taken at about 16:50.


> Over 50% for DA in Knysna. Knysna and Bitou’s final results were posted shortly before 17:00 when these screenshots of the results were taken.


The significance of the Knysna outcome where the DA won over 50% of the total vote was that it “ now has the numbers to defeat the ‘Coalition of Corruption’,” said Knysna constituency head Dion George.

Read more on sister publication, Knysna-Plett Herald


> Screenshots as taken from Knysna-Plett Herald (visit site for full results).


‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
